dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: Go in to your brother's wife and perform the duty of a brother-in-law to her, and raise up offspring for your brother

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: Remain a widow in your father's house until Shelah my son grows up

dialogue.speaker: unnamed-messenger
dialogue.englishText: Behold, your father-in-law is going up to Timnah to shear his sheep

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: Come now, let me come in to you

dialogue.speaker: tamar
dialogue.englishText: What will you give me, that you may come in to me?

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: I will send a young goat from the flock

dialogue.speaker: tamar
dialogue.englishText: If you give a pledge until you send it

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: What pledge shall I give you?

dialogue.speaker: tamar
dialogue.englishText: Your signet and your cord and your staff that is in your hand

dialogue.speaker: hirah
dialogue.englishText: Where is the cult prostitute who was at Enaim on the road?

dialogue.speaker: men-of-the-place
dialogue.englishText: There has been no cult prostitute here

dialogue.speaker: hirah
dialogue.englishText: I did not find her; and also the men of the place said no cult prostitute has been here

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: Let her keep the things for herself, lest we be put to shame; behold, I sent this young goat and you have not found her

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: Bring her out and let her be burned

dialogue.speaker: tamar
dialogue.englishText: By the man to whom these belong, I am pregnant

dialogue.speaker: tamar
dialogue.englishText: Please identify whose these are — the signet and the cords and the staff

dialogue.speaker: judah
dialogue.englishText: She is more righteous than I, since I did not give her to Shelah my son

dialogue.speaker: midwife
dialogue.englishText: What a breach you have made for yourself! — Perez
